title: IT Help Desk Update
text:
## IT Help Desk Update

@helpdesk heads-up:

**Issue:** The {adjective} printer on floor {number} is {adjective} again.

**On site:** {person} with a {adjective} toolkit while {person} clears the password-reset {object}.

**Users affected:** Anyone trying to {verb} or use the {adjective} conference room.

**Workaround:** Route jobs to the {adjective} copier and {verb} your laptop until further notice.

**ETA:** {number} minutes unless the print spooler acts {adjective} again.

Please stop opening tickets titled "The internet is {adjective}."
